STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TERRA, JUDITH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 535 BRODERICK #4, STAYED UNTIL JAN-15-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00 PM PROVIDEDD DEFT PAYS $334 BY 12-27-95. IF DEFT FAILS TO PAY OR TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES, FEES & COSTS. PLTF TO KEEP ANY DEPOSITS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
